chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3928 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16134/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 3. For order on Misc. No.16135/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.16136/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 27.8.2025 Mr. Farhat Hussain advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The main grievance of learned counsel for the petitioner is that an unauthorized construction has been raised on House No.R-160, Block-15, Dastagir, F.B. Area, Karachi. However, he has not approached the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) by filing an application through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM). Accordingly, the petitioner shall at the first instance approach the SBCA through the SCRM. In the event that he makes such complaint on the SCRM, it shall be dealt with by the SBCA as per its own SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
